text.title: inverted-header-content-first Output Contract
text.summary: BlogPost schema with body-first ordering plus validation rules.

section.title: JSON Schema (body-first)

example.note: Body emitted first; title and slug condition on the full body that already exists in the JSON output buffer.
Title was committed before the body existed; body must fit the blind label. Validator rejects.

list.item: `body` is the first key in the schema definition order.
Every metadata field's description references `body` by name.
If streaming title-first is required, schema is single-field body only with a separate cheap metadata schema.
